abilities.shortEffect: Strengthens Fire moves to inflict 1.5× damage at 1/3 max HP or less.
abilities.effect: When this Pokémon has 1/3 or less of its HP remaining, its Fire-type moves inflict 1.5× as much regular damage.

abilities.shortEffect: Libero changes the Pokémon's type to that of its previously used attack.
abilities.effect: Changes the Pokémon’s type to the type of the move it’s about to use. This works only once each time the Pokémon enters battle.
